sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT, value FLOAT, category VARCHAR);
SELECT geometric_mean(value) / 2 AS half_geomean FROM (SELECT value FROM test_data WHERE category = 'A' OR value IS NULL GROUP BY category) AS sub;
SELECT category, geometric_mean(value) AS geomean_val FROM test_data GROUP BY category HAVING geomean_val > 0.5 ORDER BY geomean_val DESC;
SELECT id, value / (SELECT geometric_mean(value) FROM test_data WHERE category = 'B') AS adjusted_value FROM test_data;
WITH temp AS (SELECT value FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL) SELECT geometric_mean(value) / geometric_mean(NULLIF(value, 0)) AS adjusted_geomean FROM temp;
SELECT category, geometric_mean(value) AS geo_mean FROM test_data GROUP BY category HAVING geo_mean > (SELECT AVG(geometric_mean(value)) FROM test_data) / 2;
CREATE TABLE test_data_ext (id INT, value_str VARCHAR);
SELECT geometric_mean(CAST(value_str AS FLOAT)) FROM test_data_ext WHERE value_str IS NOT NULL;
SELECT AVG(rounded_values) AS avg_adjusted FROM (SELECT ROUND(geometric_mean(value) / NULLIF((id + 1) / 2.0, 0), 2) AS rounded_values FROM test_data GROUP BY category) AS subquery;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_transformed AS SELECT id, geometric_mean(COALESCE(value, 1.0)) AS geo_mean_value FROM test_data GROUP BY id;
SELECT DISTINCT id, geo_mean_value / (SELECT geometric_mean(value) FROM test_data WHERE category = 'C') FROM temp_transformed WHERE geo_mean_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT category, geometric_mean(COALESCE(NULLIF(value, 0), 1)) AS corrected_geomean FROM test_data GROUP BY category HAVING corrected_geomean > 1.0;
